description: Operated within Microsoft's Fairwater facility, supporting deployment and maintenance of NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 rack systems.
Performed fiber optic link validation across multi-tier topologies (T0/T1/T2) from IDF/MOR aggregations to TOR switches.
Resolved 30+ hardware break-fix tickets, managing physical integrity and power-cycling of compute components and NVLinks.
Trained team members and managed high-volume operational workflows under strict time constraints.

items.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science (Cybersecurity Engineering Emphasis)
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (Minor in Cybersecurity)

items.name: Torii: Master's Applied Research Project
description: Architecting a self-hosted gateway bridging Layer 7 verification with kernel-level eBPF packet filtering.
Building a memory-safe Rust reverse proxy to enforce strict identity verification via OpenID Connect.
Optimizing HTTP/3 using QUIC connection IDs with eBPF fast-path forwarding for persistent, E2EE tunnels.

items.name: AI-Powered Command & Control (C2) Server
description: Developed a Rust-based payload factory using semaphores for concurrent generation, processing jobs via Redis queues.
Engineered API endpoints for payload distribution, using PostgreSQL for state persistence and immutable audit logging.
Built robust background workers with automated filesystem cleanup routines to manage stale build artifacts.

items.name: Ember - Cloud-Native Code Snippet Manager
description: Architected a full-stack snippet platform featuring complexity analysis, built with Nuxt, TypeScript, BetterAuth, and Tailwind.
Built an Admin Dashboard with real-time analytics and audit logging to monitor user activity.
Containerized the application with Docker and established an automated CI/CD pipeline via Woodpecker CI.

items.name: HomeServer
description: Manage 50TB of data storage with automated Kopia backups for data resilience and integrity.
Orchestrate a self-hosted environment using Ubuntu Server, Docker, and Incus for service isolation.
Hardened network via NetBird VPN, Cloudflare, Caddy, and CrowdSec to control public exposure.
